results.resolved_title: The type III secretion substrates CT142, CT143, and CT144 are secreted into the lumen of the inclusion
results.quote: we previously described the identification of 10 likely candidate T3S substrates (CT053, CT105, CT142, CT143, CT144, CT161, CT338, CT429, CT656, and CT849)
results.note: Full text; CT142 is one of 10 named C. trachomatis T3S substrates and shown secreted into inclusion lumen.

results.resolved_title: The type III secretion substrates CT142, CT143, and CT144 are secreted into the lumen of the inclusion
results.quote: we previously described the identification of 10 likely candidate T3S substrates (CT053, CT105, CT142, CT143, CT144, CT161, CT338, CT429, CT656, and CT849)
results.note: Title and full text: CT143 is a T3S substrate secreted into inclusion lumen of C. trachomatis.

results.resolved_title: The type III secretion substrates CT142, CT143, and CT144 are secreted into the lumen of the inclusion
results.quote: we previously described the identification of 10 likely candidate T3S substrates (CT053, CT105, CT142, CT143, CT144, CT161, CT338, CT429, CT656, and CT849)
results.note: Title names CT144 as a T3S substrate of C. trachomatis.

results.resolved_title: The secretome of the plant pathogenic bacterium Erwinia chrysanthemi
results.quote: the type II Out system mediates secretion ... we identified spots corresponding to the endopectate lyases PelA, PelB, PelC, PelD, PelE, PelI, PelL and PelZ
results.note: Erwinia chrysanthemi = Dickeya dadantii (reclassified). Abstract: pectinases incl. PelA secreted via type II (Out) system.

results.resolved_title: The secretome of the plant pathogenic bacterium Erwinia chrysanthemi
results.quote: we identified spots corresponding to the endopectate lyases PelA, PelB, PelC, PelD, PelE, PelI, PelL and PelZ ... the type II Out system
results.note: PelD among Out (T2SS) secreted pectinases of E. chrysanthemi (= D. dadantii).

results.resolved_title: The secretome of the plant pathogenic bacterium Erwinia chrysanthemi
results.quote: the pectin methylesterase PemA ... the type II Out system mediates secretion
results.note: PemA (pectin methylesterase) among Out/T2SS-secreted proteins of E. chrysanthemi (= D. dadantii).

results.resolved_title: The secretome of the plant pathogenic bacterium Erwinia chrysanthemi
results.quote: the pectin acetylesterases PaeX and PaeY ... the type II Out system mediates secretion
results.note: PaeY (pectin acetylesterase) among Out/T2SS-secreted pectinases of E. chrysanthemi (= D. dadantii).

results.resolved_title: Disruption of signaling by Yersinia effector YopJ, a ubiquitin-like protein protease
results.quote: Homologs of the Yersinia virulence effector YopJ are found in both plant and animal bacterial pathogens
results.note: Abstract establishes YopJ as a Yersinia (T3SS) virulence effector; YopJ/YopP is the conserved effector across Yersinia spp. incl. Y. pestis.

results.resolved_title: Disruption of signaling by Yersinia effector YopJ, a ubiquitin-like protein protease
results.quote: Homologs of the Yersinia virulence effector YopJ are found in both plant and animal bacterial pathogens
results.note: Same YopJ/YopP effector; abstract treats it as the conserved Yersinia T3SS effector, consistent with Y. enterocolitica YopP.

results.resolved_title: Multinucleated giant cell formation and apoptosis in infected host cells is mediated by Burkholderia pseudomallei type III secretion protein BipB
results.note: Full PMC text retrieved; paper is about BipB (and BipC/BipD). BopA / locus BPSS1524 is not mentioned anywhere in the paper.

results.resolved_title: Multinucleated giant cell formation and apoptosis in infected host cells is mediated by Burkholderia pseudomallei type III secretion protein BipB
results.quote: Multinucleated giant cell formation and apoptosis in infected host cells is mediated by Burkholderia pseudomallei type III secretion protein BipB
results.note: Title; full text describes BipB as a B. pseudomallei T3SS (TTSS3/bsa) translocator protein.

results.resolved_title: The Syntrophy hypothesis for the origin of eukaryotes revisited
results.note: Crossref: this DOI is Lopez-Garcia & Moreira, 'The Syntrophy hypothesis for the origin of eukaryotes revisited' (Nat Microbiol 2020), not about Tfe1 or any T6SS effector. Real Tfe paper is DOI 10.1038/s41564-018-0191-x.

results.resolved_title: The Syntrophy hypothesis for the origin of eukaryotes revisited
results.note: Crossref: DOI is an evolutionary-biology review on eukaryote origins, not Tfe2 / Serratia T6SS. Provenance mismatch.

results.resolved_title: A Type VI Secretion System of Pseudomonas aeruginosa Targets a Toxin to Bacteria
results.quote: Two VgrG-family proteins, the products of open reading frames PA0091 and PA2685, were the most abundant C2 proteins ... the H1-T6SS exports at least two VgrG-family proteins
results.note: PA0091 = VgrG1, secreted by P. aeruginosa H1-T6SS (Western blots require clpV1, repressed by retS).

results.resolved_title: A Type VI Secretion System of Pseudomonas aeruginosa Targets a Toxin to Bacteria
results.quote: Two VgrG-family proteins, the products of open reading frames PA0091 and PA2685, were the most abundant C2 proteins ... the H1-T6SS exports at least two VgrG-family proteins
results.note: PA2685 = VgrG4, secreted by P. aeruginosa H1-T6SS (confirmed by Western blot).

results.resolved_title: Structural insights into the assembly of the type III secretion needle complex
results.note: Full PMC text checked: paper is a cryo-EM structural study of the Salmonella T3SS needle complex (InvG, PrgH, PrgK, PrgI, PrgJ). SspH1 effector is not mentioned anywhere; wrong subject for an SspH1 effector citation.

results.resolved_title: Expression Technology Identifies a Novel Virulence Factor Critical for Borrelia burgdorferi Persistence in Mice
results.note: This DOI resolves to a Borrelia burgdorferi (Lyme) IVET study; no Vibrio, VopC, VPA1321, T3SS, or effector text present in full text. Wrong organism and protein.

results.resolved_title: K63-Linked Ubiquitination Targets Toxoplasma gondii for Endo-lysosomal Destruction in IFNgamma-Stimulated Human Cells
results.note: DOI resolves to a Toxoplasma gondii ubiquitination paper; no Coxiella, NopA, CBU1217, Dot/Icm, or T4SS content in full text. Wrong organism and protein.

results.resolved_title: The type II secretion system delivers matrix proteins for biofilm formation by Vibrio cholerae
results.quote: wild-type V. cholerae was found to secrete the biofilm matrix proteins RbmC, RbmA, and Bap1 into the culture supernatant, while an isogenic T2S mutant could not
results.note: Abstract: RbmC is a V. cholerae biofilm matrix protein secreted by the type II (T2S) system.

results.resolved_title: Ku70, a component of DNA-dependent protein kinase, is a mammalian receptor for Rickettsia conorii
results.note: Crossref: DOI is Martinez et al., Cell 2005, on Ku70 as a host receptor for Rickettsia conorii. Not about Agrobacterium VirD2 or T4SS. Provenance mismatch.

results.resolved_title: The bacterial cytoskeleton modulates motility, type 3 secretion, and colonization in Salmonella
results.note: This DOI resolves to a Salmonella MreB/MreC cytoskeleton & SPI1-T3SS study; no VipA, lpg0390, Legionella, or T4SS content in full text. Wrong organism and protein/system.

results.resolved_title: Giant stem tetrapod was apex predator in Gondwanan late Palaeozoic ice age
results.note: Crossref: DOI is Marsicano et al., Nature 2024, a paleontology paper on a Gondwanan tetrapod. Not about Legionella LnaB or T4SS. Provenance mismatch.

results.resolved_title: Positive charge is an important feature of the C-terminal transport signal of the VirB/D4-translocated proteins of Agrobacterium tumefaciens
results.quote: We also found another translocated effector protein, namely the VirD5 protein encoded by the tumor-inducing plasmid
results.note: Abstract: VirD5 is a VirB/D4 (T4SS) translocated effector of Agrobacterium. A. fabrum C58 = A. tumefaciens C58 synonym.

results.resolved_title: Transition from reversible to irreversible attachment during biofilm formation by Pseudomonas fluorescens WCS365 requires an ABC transporter and a large secreted protein
results.quote: The LapA protein, with a predicted molecular weight of ~900 kDa, is found to be loosely associated with the cell surface and present in the culture supernatant
results.note: Subject is P. fluorescens WCS365 (LapA secreted via ABC transporter = T1SS); abstract notes lap genes conserved in P. putida KT2440. Cited here for the P. putida homolog; secretion role established.

results.resolved_title: Lack of functional complementation between Bordetella pertussis filamentous hemagglutinin and Proteus mirabilis HpmA hemolysin secretion machineries
results.quote: FhaC proved to be unable to mediate secretion and activation of HpmA, the cognate secretory partner of HpmB
results.note: Abstract: HpmA is the secreted/activated Proteus mirabilis hemolysin (two-partner secretion / T5SS), partner of accessory protein HpmB.
